extra.reason: Fixed: AccountMembership create/update/destroy now require owner/admin role; User read/update/destroy scoped to self; settings_live enforces role + passes actor. Also fixed a related latent bug in Account's own update/destroy policy (broken relates_to_actor_via filter: option). 967 tests passing.

Fixed: catalog path resolved via Application.app_dir(:grocery_planner, ...); regression test changes cwd to tmp and loads the catalog (verified red against old code); grep confirms no other cwd-relative priv reads in lib/ (receipts_live and process_receipt already use :code.priv_dir).

Fixed both defects: list_grocery_items now passes authorize?: false (dedup works); import_ingredients returns {:error, _} on first failure via reduce_while, propagated through import_recipe. Both regression tests verified red against old code. 972 tests passing.

Decision: DELETE. Module was referenced nowhere (never supervised, never configured, zero tests) and had never run; fixing it properly is a feature build with the wrong architecture anyway (hand-rolled scheduling vs existing Oban Cron, hardcoded 7AM UTC vs account timezones). Deleted 303 lines; nothing orphaned (ExpirationAlerts/RecipeSuggestions/Mailer used elsewhere). Rebuild requirements + the dead email_notifications_enabled toggle captured in follow-up grocery_planner-wl5.

Fixed in same PR: copy_previous_day now queries list_meal_plans_by_date_range for the source day instead of the week-scoped cache; deterministic regression test pins the Monday/week-boundary case. Was also blocking all Monday-UTC CI runs via the date-dependent test.

research complete: use pgvector/pgvector:pg18 (0.8.5, amd64) for prod; PG18+ claim is installer drift, actual floor is PG16 (CI-proven) - evidence in docs/research/prod-postgres-image.md on research/prod-postgres-image
Decided: orange-cloud proxied, zone SSL Full (strict), CF default websocket proxying. See resolution comment.
Decided: force_ssl [rewrite_on: :x_forwarded_proto, hsts: true]; Postgres TLS dropped from 4p7 scope (single-host docker network, no untrusted hop).
design/ bundle committed (a6dab94, CI green), synced to 'Grocery Planner' claude.ai/design project (18 files)
Prototype on branch prototype/prod-compose; cache=volume, sidecar 2cpu/2g, AI categorization off pending DeepInfra review. See resolution comment.

All three CI deploy secrets provisioned on d-j-will/grocery_planner: DEPLOY_HOST=100.109.69.108 (docker-host tailnet IP), DEPLOY_SSH_KEY (dedicated ed25519 deploy@github-actions keypair; pubkey installed+verified on docker-host, private half only in the secret), TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY (reusable/ephemeral/pre-approved, owner-minted). Dual-secret deploy gate now satisfiable in tdu.6. Flag: tailnet ACLs appear to gate host:22 (non-tagged node blocked, LAN OK) — CI runner needs tag:ci + ACL to route.

Owner pruned the docker host. Result: / at 65% (was 83%), 11G free of 32G — comfortable for the ~2-3GB first deploy (app+sidecar+pgvector images + pg/HF/uploads volumes). Note: docker reports 11.28GB 'reclaimable' images but 27/28 are ACTIVE (other running apps), so that is not real headroom; 11G free is. Unblocks tdu.6.
Skillet port shipped in bb01dcc: 4 themes via daisyui-theme blocks, self-hosted fonts, serif ramp on page_header/section/header, theme migration, design/ bundle mirrored

CI gate polled /health (bare liveness) which greenlights the instant uvicorn binds the port; the first integration test then races /health/ready (DB+model warm-up) → timeout. Fixed by gating on /health/ready and raising the wait cap 30→60s. Aligns with org-brain integration-tests-run-against-prod-identical-db (poll the real readiness signal, not liveness) and single-instance-ship-ready-defer-liveness (why the two endpoints differ). CPU-only torch (9b98724) had already shrunk the race window.

Deepening shipped: browse_recipes/2 (first commit fab-range) + fan-out re-scoped — recipe_show migrated, name_matches?/2 shared across the 5 cached sites, dead-action deletion void (all still in use). precommit green (996 tests). Pantry sort remains as uiy.

Never-raise normalizing ACL for categorizer (coerce confidence, derive confidence_level, validate category, error tuples) + embeddings empty-list clause. Deleted dead+unsafe Contracts/AI.Schema (atomize ran String.to_existing_atom on every server key). ai_client reads :ai_service_url app config; error log drops PII body. Boundary tests: int/null/unknown/extra-key/empty. precommit green 925 tests.

Shipped: partial unique slot index + :place upsert (replace) + bulk pre-filter (skip) + transactional swap + dedup migration + data_loader collision warning. 8 boundary tests green; full precommit green (932 tests).

Arc 1 shipped: AiClient classifies errors (§4a), flat contract enriched (currency/raw_ocr_text/overall_confidence/model_version/processing_time_ms), receipt_processor parses flat shape only, hardcoded USD gone (unblocks 83o), two-sided contract test. CI green (dc2aff9).

Shipped: python_service/Makefile (uv runner, make test/lint/serve, pins Python from .tool-versions). Bumped 3.11.15→3.12.13 in .tool-versions + Dockerfile (bullseye→bookworm). Verified local (89 passed/1 skip, ruff clean) and CI green (0e040c2).

Shipped: staged extract->persist->match->categorise as custom Oban workers (AshOban can't do action-driven snooze/cancel); stage+condition durable state model; raw_extraction jsonb handoff; line_no + partial unique index; §4b taxonomy (snooze+awaiting_ai / cancel+failed / error) with capped backoff; reconciler AshOban trigger + Lifeline; matching moved out of LiveView. Tests drive real workers incl. drain-based enqueue-chain assertion. 955 tests + integration green (d5c69d3).

Completed in 539a6e3 (was left in_progress). runtime.exs gates prod OTel on OTEL_ENABLED + OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT (unset->off/:none; enabled-no-endpoint->warns+disables; enabled+endpoint->:otlp to it); setup_opentelemetry/0 skips attaching handlers when disabled. All 3 acceptance criteria met — criterion 3 (spans arrive) documented as pending a homelab collector (INFRA-002), which the criterion allows. Covered by test/config/runtime_otel_test.exs (3 branches) + telemetry_test.exs. CI green.

Deployed to food.davewil.dev as v0.2.0 (tag → deploy-homelab, both jobs green). All 31 EEF/OSV advisories cleared (hex.audit clean); full ash 3.29 / money-stack / HTTP-stack migration; CI green incl. integration; prod verified live (/ HTTP 200, /ready 200 = DB+migrations OK, /health_check 200). Follow-ups filed: midnight-boundary test flake, Cldr provider warning tidy-up. Deploy also shipped AI-006 Arc 2/3 + observability (everything on main since v0.1.0).

Absorbed by AI-006 Arc 2's staged pipeline (stage/condition milestones). All 4 acceptance criteria now verified with tests: (1) failed status + broadcast — producer assertion added in pipeline_test + consumer in receipt_live_test; (2) idempotent retry — persist-twice test; (3) status only after items persist — staged milestones + ordering test; (4) check_duplicate fails closed — fixed fail-open bug (not_found_error?: false + fail-closed branch) in 61e4d77 with edge test. 971 tests green.

Fixed in c1f9336. Root cause was 3 stacked defects (not just the app/config mismatch): worker registration, missing AshObanInteraction auth bypass (actorless read -> cancel), and vectorize targeting a non-existent full_text_vector column instead of :embedding. All acceptance criteria met: create enqueues+persists embedding (drain-success test), raw-SQL workers deleted, Ash-native EmbeddingBackfill.run/0 replaces backfill (tested), application.ex + config.exs agree. 973 tests green, ash.codegen --check clean.

Fixed in 18d7744. Sidecar collapsed to stateless: deleted jobs.py/artifacts.py/database.py, the /jobs, /artifacts, /feedback, /receipts/extract endpoints + the Mock-Supermarket receipt_extraction handler, all Depends(get_db), and the job/artifact/feedback/receipts-extract schemas (kept the 5 receipt_ocr-shared ones). Rewrote /health/ready to drop the DB probe (landed with the datastore drop). Removed the OTel SQLAlchemy instrumentation + dep. Deleted dead Elixir AiClient.submit_job/get_job. Removed ai-data volume + AI_DATABASE_URL from compose/Dockerfile. ~2000 lines deleted; Python 70 passed/ruff clean, Elixir 971 green.

Fixed in 18d7744 (folded into Arc 4). health_controller: AI sidecar down => degraded => 200 (was 503); only DB failure => 503. Boundary tests updated. Dev docker-compose: elixir-app depends on python-service via service_started (not service_healthy) so the app boots without the sidecar, + a /ready compose healthcheck (prod compose already had both). Dockerfile already had curl. Cross-boundary verified: Elixir reads only the sidecar's top-level status.

Observability arc delivered: OTel exporter gated on OTEL_ENABLED (t7j), PromEx /metrics with awaiting_ai outage gauge + Oban plugin dead-letter/queue metrics, admin-gated Oban Web, all live in prod. Live-trace gate (web→worker) is a code gap (opentelemetry_liveview absent) split to grocery_planner-23v. Error-rate-by-class remains dci.

Metrics/dashboard value delivered and live-verified 2026-07-18: prometheus on monitoring net scraping grocery-planner:4000 (health=up), awaiting_ai + discarded queryable, grocery-planner-receipts.json provisioned. Shipped via new slackex deploy-infra workflow_dispatch job (c3662ad, run 29625749850). Criterion 3 (web→worker trace) split to grocery_planner-23v as a code gap.

Done + CI green (70fc3d4 on main). receipt.upload span at the domain boundary + Pipeline.insert→OpentelemetryOban.insert; boundary test receipt_trace_propagation_test.exs asserts the enqueued extract job's meta carries the upload span's trace context (RED→GREEN, 972 tests). opentelemetry_liveview (raw LiveView-event root) intentionally deferred.

AI-006 epic complete: all four arcs closed. Arc 1 (honest seam/error classification), Arc 2 (staged AshOban durable-milestone pipeline), Arc 4 (stateless sidecar collapse), Arc 3 (observability: exporter, awaiting_ai gauge, Oban Web — live). Web→worker trace propagation split to 23v (done). Follow-ups tracked separately: dci (error-rate-by-class), 83o (unblocked).
